subcodes.first_line: O My leaf! The Most Exalted Pen hath lamented over that which hath befallen thee at the hands of Mine enemies, who have cast aside the Book of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی قد ناح قلمی الاعلی بما ورد علیکم من اعدائی الذین نبذوا کتاب الله
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
